case_title: PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC. VS. 1799 RESTAURANTS LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF PAN-O-RAMA BAKING INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BONNIE LAI OFFICE MANAGER. DEFENDANT 1799 RESTAURNATS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC.
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC.
